heading: Limitations on school-based health centers
label: 7923 Limitations on school-based health centers
text: Notwithstanding , funds used for activities under this chapter shall be carried out in accordance with the provision of .section 7802 of this titlesection 280h–5(a)(3)(C) of title 42
